news.summary: A recent study revealed that the global population has reached 7.8 billion. It also highlighted that the unemployment rate has increased to 6.2%, with approximately 190 million people currently jobless worldwide. Additionally, the report showed that the poverty rate has surged to 10.7%, with over 800 million individuals living in poverty. The study emphasized the critical need for international cooperation to address these pressing issues and improve the livelihoods of people globally.
news.headline: Gold prices rose slightly as investors assessed the impact of a trade agreement between the US and UK.

news.summary: Ether experienced a 20% surge in the past 24 hours due to the launch of the Pectra upgrade, trading at $2,230. This spike was attributed to new long positions, leading to a rise in Ether Open Interest by 21%. If the price falls to $2,000, $2.06 billion in long positions could face liquidation, with $328 million in short positions already liquidated. Ether had faced a downward trend in 2025, falling 56% to $1,472 by April 9 but has since seen a 52% increase over the last 30 days. Bitcoin also gained, surpassing $100,000. The recent rally was driven by the Pectra upgrade and other factors like the US-UK trade deal and Coinbase's merger with Deribit. Despite historical trends indicating a possible surge in Ether to $2,950 by the end of June, the spot Ether ETFs are not reflecting this momentum, with outflows of $16.1 million on May 8. The overall crypto market surged by 4.95% in the past 24 hours, with the Crypto Fear & Greed Index rising to 73.
news.headline: 20% surge in Ether post Pectra launch, hitting $2,230; ETH longs spike, marking potential shift. Ether Open Interest up 21% too.

news.summary: A collaboration between SiFive and Kinara has resulted in the development of a new method for customers to conduct bare metal testing using the X280 processor IP. This partnership aims to provide users with enhanced testing capabilities and improved performance. Santa Clara-based SiFive's X280 processor IP is set to revolutionize the testing process, offering customers a more efficient and effective way to test their systems. This partnership signifies a significant step forward in the realm of processor IP testing, presenting new opportunities for innovation and advancement in the field.
news.headline: SiFive teams up with Kinara to offer bare metal access to X280 processor IP for RISC-V vector processors.
Middlefield Canadian Income PCC: Shareholdings of Director/PDMR disclosed following regulatory requirements.

news.summary: INVL Baltic Real Estate announced on April 30, 2025, that at the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders, a resolution was passed to decrease the authorized capital by cancelling 107,480 of its own ordinary registered shares obtained through share buy-back.
news.headline: INVL Baltic Real Estate to reduce authorized capital by canceling 107,480 own shares bought back on April 30, 2025.

news.summary: Cornish Metals welcomed Her Royal Highness The Princess Royal at South Crofty, unveiling a plaque to mark the re-opening of the New Cook’s Kitchen ("NCK") shaft.
news.headline: Cornish Metals welcomed Princess Royal at South Crofty, unveiling plaque to re-open NCK shaft.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, in Taipei, Skymizer introduced HyperThought, a new AI accelerator IP following the success of EdgeThought in 2024. EdgeThought had transformed on-device LLM inferencing. HyperThought is designed to cater to the increasing needs for advanced AI processing.
news.headline: Skymizer introduces HyperThought AI chip IP after success of EdgeThought LPU in 2024. Meet demands with powerful tech.

news.summary: Our revenue and EBITDA for the first quarter are consistent with our projections. We are reiterating our EBITDA forecast for 2025, which is expected to range between DKK 530 million and DKK 600 million.
news.headline: Solar A/S expects revenue growth in 2025, with Q1 revenue and EBITDA meeting expectations. EBITDA guidance is DKK 530-600m.

news.summary: IDA announced an increase in the size of its underwritten public offering to 4,504,505 shares of common stock, priced at $111.00 per share. The offering involves forward sellers, Morgan Stanley, J.P. Morgan, and Wells Fargo Securities, who will borrow all shares from third parties and sell them to underwriters in the offering under certain conditions.
news.headline: IDACORP, Inc. prices 4,504,505 shares of common stock at $111 each in upsized public offering.
MT Højgaard Holding A/S reports strong performance in Q1 2025.

news.summary: In recent updates, it has been reported that the government is planning to allocate approximately $5 million towards the development of a new infrastructure project. This initiative is expected to create over 500 new job opportunities in the construction sector. Additionally, it has been revealed that the project will cover an area of 10 acres and is projected to be completed within the next two years. The aim of this endeavor is to enhance the overall connectivity and accessibility within the region, thus fostering economic growth and development.
news.headline: Beachgoers in UK fall ill as sewage crisis worsens, affecting hundreds.

news.summary: In 2021, Kristian Røkke, Chairman of Aker Horizons ASA, engaged in a share-based investment initiative where the Company divested shares in its subsidiary Aker Horizons Holding AS for NOK 25 million. Of this amount, NOK 10 million were disbursed upfront.
news.headline: Aker Horizons Chairman invested NOK 25 million in 2021, with NOK 10 million paid out.

news.summary: In Dongguan, China on May 7, 2025, QCY, a well-known brand in wireless audio technology, proudly reveals that their QCY H3 Pro Adaptive Noise Cancelling Headphones have been awarded the Red Dot Design Award 2025. This award is recognized as one of the most prestigious accolades in the global design industry.
news.headline: QCY H3 Pro headphones win Red Dot Design Award 2025, a globally renowned brand in wireless audio technology.

news.summary: Founder and ex-CEO Alex Mashinsky of the defunct cryptocurrency lender, Celsius Network, received a 12-year prison sentence for securities and commodities fraud. U.S. District Judge John Koeltl in Manhattan issued the sentence. Mashinsky was accused by federal prosecutors of misleading customers about Celsius' safety and inflating the value of its native token, Celsius (CRYPTO: CEL). Prosecutors sought a 20-year imprisonment, citing the extensive impact of Mashinsky's actions on numerous victims.
news.headline: Celsius Network's founder Alex Mashinsky sentenced to 12 years in prison for securities and commodities fraud.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that United States citizens spent a total of $61.9 billion on their pets in 2020, marking a significant increase compared to previous years. This spending includes various items such as food, supplies, veterinary care, and other services for their beloved animals. The data shows a growing trend in the pet industry, with more Americans prioritizing their pets' well-being and investing in their overall health and happiness. This substantial rise in pet-related spending highlights the deep bond between owners and their pets and the lengths Americans are willing to go to ensure their furry friends are well-cared for.
news.headline: Indian Central Bank poised to support rupee as currency weakens, source reports.

news.summary: Today, Bavarian Nordic A/S (OMX: BAVA) revealed its interim financial results and business performance for the initial quarter of 2025 in Copenhagen, Denmark. The report highlights the company's progress during this period.
news.headline: Bavarian Nordic (OMX: BAVA) reports Q1 2025 financial results and business progress, released in Copenhagen.

news.summary: A total of 1,500 new cases of COVID-19 have been reported in the past 24 hours, bringing the total number of confirmed cases in the country to 50,000. Additionally, there have been 20 new deaths, increasing the total death toll to 2,000. The government has announced new restrictions in response to the rising numbers, including the closure of non-essential businesses and a limit on public gatherings to 10 people. Efforts to increase testing and contact tracing are also being implemented to control the spread of the virus.
news.headline: Nordic leaders discuss ceasefire with Trump, Zelenskiy. - Websiteisclosed.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a historic low of 3.8%, with a record number of 250,000 new jobs created in the last quarter. This positive trend indicates a strong and growing economy, providing hope for those seeking employment opportunities. Experts attribute this success to various factors, including increased consumer spending and business expansion. Despite this positive news, there are concerns about potential wage stagnation and the need for continued job growth to sustain this momentum. The government has expressed optimism about further reducing the unemployment rate and boosting the economy in the coming months.
news.headline: Indian central bank prepared to support rupee amidst escalating tensions, reports say.

Brunel, a worldwide expert in providing tailored project and workforce services to facilitate sustainable industry advancements utilizing technology and skilled individuals, shared their findings.

news.summary: During Intersolar Europe 2025 in Munich on May 9, 2025, Beibei Zheng, Vice President of CHINT Global, highlighted the company's dedication to promoting ESG-aligned and full-lifecycle low-carbon solutions. CHINT plans to invest further in these initiatives to support their clients in adopting sustainable practices.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, in Oslo, Norway, Aker Horizons ASA ("AKH") and Aker Carbon Capture ASA ("ACC") made announcements about transactions involving Aker entities. These independent transactions are part of a strategic initiative. Key numbers and details were disclosed, with both companies outlining significant plans for the future.
news.headline: Transactions announced by Aker ASA, Aker Horizons ASA, and Aker Carbon Capture ASA on May 9, 2025 in Oslo, Norway.

news.summary: AI decentralized apps (DApps) are gaining momentum and could challenge gaming and DeFi for the top spot in the DApp ecosystem. According to DappRadar, AI DApps have seen a rise in user activity, with a market dominance of 16% in April - up from 11% in February. AI DApp activity has surged by 26%, reaching 3.8 million daily unique active wallets compared to DeFi and Gaming which have declined slightly. The top AI DApps on DappRadar include LOL, a project that rewards users for sending voice recordings of laughter; Dmail Network, an AI-powered messaging service; and World.Fun, a launchpad for deploying AI agents into multi-agent simulations. Overall, Web3 remains strong with 23 million daily active wallets in April. The growth in AI and Social DApps signifies a shift in the decentralized landscape towards utility and narrative-driven hype. The industry execs expect AI to transform Web3 by 2025 but also anticipate challenges such as technical issues and regulatory obstacles.
news.headline: AI DApps gaining ground, up to 16% dominance in April from 11% in February. Active wallets up 26% to 3.8M dUAW. Social DApps also rising with over 15% market dominance in April. Web3 resilient amidst market turbulence.
Introduction of a buyback plan worth $XX billion for shareholders.

news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, as of May 9, 2025, the Net Asset Value ("NAV") of Aker ASA and its holding companies reached NOK 61.9 billion by the conclusion of the first quarter of 2025. This figure represents an increase from NOK 58.2 billion recorded at the end of the fourth quarter of 2024. Additionally, during Aker's Annual General Meeting, various resolutions were approved.
news.headline: Aker ASA's first quarter 2025 results show a Net Asset Value of NOK 61.9 billion, up from NOK 58.2 billion in Q4 2024.
TENCENT HUNYUAN LAUNCHES AND OPEN-SOURCES NEW MULTIMODAL VIDEO TOOL 'HUNYUAN CUSTOM,' CLAIMING SUPERIOR SUBJECT CONSISTENCY OVER EXISTING OPEN-SOURCE SOLUTIONS. $TCEHY

news.summary: Apple is reportedly developing its own microchips for various products, including smart glasses and artificial intelligence. The company is working on new processors for future devices like smart glasses with a specialized chip codenamed N401, based on Apple Watch chips but optimized for efficiency. These glasses will initially not have augmented reality features but will include cameras, microphones, and integrated AI functions. The product is expected to launch in late 2026 or 2027. Apple is also developing chips for Macs and AI servers, including M6 chips codenamed "Komodo," M7 processors codenamed "Borneo," and a more advanced future chip codenamed "Sotra." The company is working on its first dedicated AI server chips in a project named "Baltra" to enhance its Apple Intelligence platform. The Baltra chips are expected to have significantly improved processing and graphics capabilities compared to current chips, with a completion target by 2027. Additionally, Chinese tech giant Huawei has developed a powerful AI chip that could compete with high-end processors from US chip maker Nvidia.
news.headline: Apple advances towards debut of smart glasses with new microchips, including specialized N401 chip. Mass production by late 2026 or 2027; aims to rival Meta's Ray-Bans. Apple also developing new chips codenamed "Komodo," "Borneo," and "Sotra," alongside dedicated AI server chips codenamed "Baltra."Sources mention other semiconductors working on Mac and AI server chips as well. jadx述Aiming for completion by 2027 to enhance AI services.ihat.

news.summary: Coinbase Global Inc.'s CEO Brian Armstrong discussed the trend of traditional banks entering the cryptocurrency market during the first quarter earnings call. Armstrong noted the growing interest from banks after regulatory changes, revealing that Coinbase has engaged in discussions and collaborations with multiple institutions. Armstrong mentioned that some banks are considering creating their own stablecoins tied to the US dollar. However, Armstrong expressed skepticism about this approach, stating that stablecoins benefit from network effects and interoperability with other financial entities for efficient payment settlements. Armstrong emphasized the importance of collaboration in the cryptocurrency industry.
news.headline: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong warns against traditional banks creating own stablecoins, pitches USDC as better option.

news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, on May 9, 2025, TGS, a prominent energy data and intelligence provider, has revealed a substantial rise in acquisition operations across Northern Europe for the upcoming summer. The company has mobilized a total of four acquisition vessels in the area: three dedicated to seismic operations and one for offshore wind research. This deployment marks a doubling in TGS's capacity from the previous year, showcasing a significant expansion in their operational capabilities.
news.headline: TGS expands in North Europe with 4 vessels this summer, doubling capacity from 2024. #energy #Norway

news.summary: Today in Fornebu, Norway, Aker ASA and Aker Horizons ASA have revealed a merger plan. The merger will involve the subsidiary of Aker Horizons ASA, Aker Horizons Holding AS, combining with a subsidiary of Aker ASA, AKH MergerCo. As part of the agreement, there will be a consideration offered for the merger.
news.headline: Aker ASA and Aker Horizons merge; AKH to merge with Aker ASA subsidiary. Early repayment of NOK 2.5 billion green bond.

SMIC Shares Plunge 11% Amid Lower Sales Forecast and Production Issues China's top chipmaker, Semiconductor Manufacturing International Corp. (SMIC), saw its shares once drop 11% in Hong Kong on Friday after warning of a 4%-6% sales decline for Q2 due to production disruptions.

news.summary: In Fornebu, Norway on May 9, 2025, Aker Carbon Capture ASA (ACC) and Aker ASA revealed a deal where Aker is set to acquire a 20% ownership stake in SLB Capturi. This agreement is a key component of a comprehensive plan for ACC as they aim to...
news.headline: Aker Carbon Capture to sell 20% ownership in SLB Capturi to Aker for cash distribution to shareholders.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States fell to 4.3% in the month of July. This marks a decrease from the previous month and is the lowest rate recorded since the beginning of the year. Additionally, the economy added 943,000 new jobs in July, exceeding expectations and demonstrating a positive trend in the labor market. The data suggests a strengthening economy and a rebound from the impact of the pandemic. The drop in unemployment coupled with significant job creation indicates potential growth and recovery on the horizon for the US economy.
news.headline: TGS reports Q1 2025 financial results.

news.summary: In Oslo, Norway on May 9, 2025, the Board of TGS ASA has decided to distribute a quarterly dividend of NOK 1.59 per share (USD 0.155 per share) for the second quarter of 2025. This decision comes after receiving approval from the Annual General Meeting held on May 8, 2025.
news.headline: TGS ASA to distribute quarterly dividend of USD 0.155 per share (NOK 1.59 per share) in Q2 2025.

news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, on May 9, 2025, Coway Co., Ltd., known as the "Best Life Solution Company," announced its financial performance for the initial quarter of 2025. Soon Tae Kim, Coway's Chief Financial Officer, expressed satisfaction with the company's strong performance in both the local and international markets. Key financial figures for the quarter include revenue of X amount and a net profit of Y amount. Coway's success was attributed to its strategic initiatives and market presence, positioning it well for future growth and expansion.
news.headline: Coway reports strong Q1 FY2025 results globally, achieving growth in domestic and global markets.

news.summary: Chinese online media platform and game business group Sohu.com Limited (NASDAQ: SOHU) is set to release its unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Monday, May 19th, 2025, before the start of U.S. market trading hours. The company's management will conduct a presentation discussing the results on that day.
news.headline: Sohu.com to release Q1 2025 financial results on May 19, 2025. Leading Chinese online media platform.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 6.7%, representing a rise of 0.4 percentage points compared to last month. This brings the total number of unemployed individuals to 10.3 million, marking an increase of 800,000 people seeking employment. The labor force participation rate remains at 61.5%, while the number of employed individuals decreased by 400,000 to a total of 142.7 million. These statistics highlight the ongoing challenges faced by the workforce as the economy continues to grapple with the effects of the pandemic.
news.headline: Xi and Putin prevents Reverse Kissinger scenario.

news.summary: The 22-year-old developer of Zerebro, previously believed to have committed suicide during a livestream, is actually alive, as confirmed by a San Francisco news outlet. The reporter spoke to Jeffy Yu outside his family home who declined to discuss the allegations. Evidence suggests Yu's suicide attempt may have been staged, including a letter confirming he's alive, crypto wallet transactions totaling $1.5 million post-incident, and the removal of his obituary. Zerebro's token reached a market cap of nearly $660 million before plummeting to $20 million. Yu expressed concerns of harassment and threats in the crypto space. There have been over 150 crypto-related physical attacks, with 46 occurring in the last year.quirer".
news.headline: Zerebro dev found alive after alleged suicide on livestream. $1.5M transactions from his wallets; ZEREBRO token market cap drops from $660M to $47.2M. Yu claims PTSD due to threats. Crypto industry faces rising violence..

news.summary: The coronavirus pandemic has caused significant financial strain on many households across the country. According to recent data, over 20 million Americans are currently receiving unemployment benefits due to job loss or reduced hours. This represents a significant increase from previous years and highlights the widespread impact of the virus on the economy. In addition, nearly 30% of small businesses have been forced to close their doors permanently as a result of the pandemic. These numbers underscore the urgent need for continued financial support and assistance for individuals and businesses during this challenging time.
news.headline: US imposes sanctions on third Chinese 'Teapot' refinery for buying Iranian oil.

news.summary: On Friday, the leading stock market indexes all saw increases exceeding 1%. Furthermore, a notable streaming music stock has entered a favorable buying zone. Specifically, the Dow Jones surged by over 500 points. Notably, Spotify reached a key buying point. This information was summarized by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Stock market jumps with Dow gaining over 500 points, major indexes up by 1%. Spotify hits buy point.

news.summary: Following a cabinet meeting, the president acknowledged the potential for a trade war to disturb supply chains.
news.headline: Trump suggests children may have 2 dolls instead of 30 due to tariffs; warns trade war could disrupt supply chains.

news.summary: NVIDIA has unveiled NV-Tesseract, a series of models revolutionizing the analysis of time-series data. This innovation is set to improve anomaly detection, forecasting, and classification in various sectors like finance and healthcare.
news.headline: NVIDIA launches NV-Tesseract models for advanced time-series data analysis, benefiting finance and healthcare sectors.

news.summary: Spirit Aerosystems Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: SPR) saw an increase in premarket trading on Monday after finalizing an agreement with Airbus SE (OTC: EADSY) to transfer ownership of certain assets and facilities. As per the deal, Airbus will take over Spirit's assets at the Kinston site in North Carolina (housing A350 fuselage sections), the St. Nazaire site in France (also for A350 fuselage sections), and the Casablanca site in Morocco (for A321 and A220 components). Additionally, the agreement includes the transfer of production of A320 and A350 wing components in Prestwick, Scotland, and the production of A220 pylons. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Spirit AeroSystems transfers key Airbus programs in $439 million deal. Assets include sites in NC, France, and Morocco. Airbus gains ownership of A350 fuselage sections, A321/A220 components. Spirit retains production of A320 and A350 wing components in Scotland.

news.summary: Chainalysis has recently integrated its compliance tools into Hadron by Tether to improve transparency and risk mitigation when tokenizing real-world assets. This move aims to enhance regulatory readiness and ensure better monitoring of transactions related to tokenized assets. The integration of Chainalysis tools into Hadron by Tether will significantly increase the effectiveness of compliance efforts and reduce risks associated with tokenization. This development marks a crucial step forward in ensuring secure and transparent processes within the digital asset industry.
news.headline: Chainalysis boosts compliance in Tether's Hadron, improving asset tokenization security for real-world assets.

news.summary: ServiceNow and NVIDIA have collaborated to unveil the Apriel Nemotron 15B, a cutting-edge AI model boasting an impressive 15 billion parameters. This powerful model aims to revolutionize enterprise AI capabilities by enabling real-time responses and streamlined management of intricate workflows.
news.headline: ServiceNow and NVIDIA present Apriel Nemotron 15B AI model, boosting enterprise AI with 15B parameters for faster response and workflow control.

news.summary: Analyst Jeffrey J. Zekauskas from JP Morgan lowered the rating of Eastman Chemical Company (NYSE: EMN) from Overweight to Neutral and reduced the price target from $112.00 to $76.00. Eastman Chemical Company reported a first-quarter adjusted EPS of $1.91 on April 25, surpassing the $1.89 estimate. However, sales of $2.29 billion fell short of the estimated $2.33 billion. For the second quarter, Eastman is expecting an adjusted EPS of $1.70-$1.90, which is lower than the consensus estimate of $2.18. The company anticipates a slight sequential volume uptick across its markets in the second quarter.
news.headline: JP Morgan downgrades Eastman Chemical, reducing price forecast to $76.00 from $112.00, after company reports Q1 EPS of $1.91 and sales of $2.29 billion missed estimate. Q2 EPS expected to be $1.70-$1.90 below consensus estimate of $2.18.
